meta.purpose: Booking contacts for ecstatic dance events featuring live musicians (handpan, RAV, ambient)
meta.note: Compiled from project research + knowledge base. Many contacts need verification via web research.

what_ecstatic_dance_books: Opening live music (handpan, RAV Vast, ambient instruments) - 15-30 min
Full ecstatic dance DJ + live hybrid sets - 2-3 hours
Sound journeys/sound baths before or after dance
why_perfect_for_flutur: RAV Vast is quintessential ecstatic dance instrument
Cooldown/closing sets are ideal entry point
Sound healing background adds value proposition
Live looping creates full journey without band
Villa Porta meditation residency = direct relevant experience

festivals.name: Ecstatic Dance Festival UK
festivals.booking_approach: Apply via website. Propose: RAV Vast opening/closing sets, sound journey workshop
festivals.notes: Run by Ecstatic Dance London. North Dorset countryside setting.

festivals.name: Black Forest Ecstatic Dance Festival
music_formats: Morning ecstatic dance under open sky
festivals.booking_approach: Perfect fit - they actively book handpan players. Propose morning or evening live accompaniment.
festivals.notes: Open-sky dancing. Mystical, nature-focused. Already books handpan artists.

festivals.name: Evolve Festival
festivals.booking_approach: 100% SOBER festival. Apply for: handpan workshop, ecstatic dance cooldown, yoga accompaniment.
festivals.notes: 200 sessions, 150+ artists. LGBTQ+ friendly. 100% sober event. Already has handpan programming!

festivals.name: Ecstatica Festival
festivals.booking_approach: Ecovillage setting. Propose live ecstatic dance accompaniment or sound journey.
festivals.notes: Located in ecovillage on Austria-Slovakia border.

regular_venues_berlin.name: Ecstatic Dance Berlin
regular_venues_berlin.booking_approach: Berlin is MAJOR ecstatic dance hub. Contact via Instagram DM first. Propose cooldown set.
regular_venues_berlin.notes: One of Europe's largest ED communities. Multiple weekly events.

regular_venues_berlin.name: Pangonia (Pantopia e.V.)
regular_venues_berlin.dates_typical: Festival: July 15-19, 2026. Monthly Berlin meetups year-round.
regular_venues_berlin.booking_approach: HANDPAN FESTIVAL! Lead with RAV Vast endorsement. Perfect for networking + booking.
regular_venues_berlin.notes: Organized by Pantopia e.V. Monthly Berlin meetups are entry point for the festival.

regular_venues_berlin.name: PANdala Gathering
regular_venues_berlin.email: RESEARCH: Contact via CAIA Academy website
regular_venues_berlin.booking_approach: Weekend gathering with ecstatic dance component. Apply for concert slot + workshop.
regular_venues_berlin.notes: Free workshops, concerts. Includes yoga, sound journeys, ecstatic dance.

regular_venues_berlin.name: Prachtwerk Berlin
regular_venues_berlin.booking_approach: Contact directly. Multi-purpose space hosting various conscious events including ED.
regular_venues_berlin.notes: Already in outreach tracking. Multi-use space for conscious events.

regular_venues_amsterdam.name: Ecstatic Dance Amsterdam
regular_venues_amsterdam.booking_approach: Amsterdam is ED capital of Europe. Contact via Instagram. Propose RAV Vast cooldown.
regular_venues_amsterdam.notes: Major hub - multiple weekly events. Dutch scene very developed.

regular_venues_amsterdam.name: Ecstatic Dance Rotterdam
regular_venues_amsterdam.booking_approach: Already books live percussion & handpan for cooldown. Perfect fit!
regular_venues_amsterdam.notes: Specifically uses live handpan for cooldown sessions!

regular_venues_amsterdam.name: Conscious Club Amsterdam
regular_venues_amsterdam.booking_approach: Multi-purpose conscious venue. Contact for sound healing + ED cooldown.

regular_venues_london.name: Ecstatic Dance London
regular_venues_london.booking_approach: Main UK ED community. Also runs the UK festival. Contact for both.
regular_venues_london.notes: Same org runs Ecstatic Dance Festival UK. Good entry point.

regular_venues_london.name: Morning Gloryville
regular_venues_london.booking_approach: Morning sober raves. Contact for live music component.
regular_venues_london.notes: Morning sober rave movement. International brand.

regular_venues_london.name: Somatica London
regular_venues_london.booking_approach: Body-focused conscious dance. Good for sound healing integration.
regular_venues_london.notes: Part of broader UK conscious dance scene.

regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.name: The Shanti Space
regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.location: Near Lisbon (30 min), near Ericeira (15 min)
regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.booking_approach: Family-run sanctuary. Already hosts monthly ED + Kirtan. Perfect for RAV Vast sets.
regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.notes: Woodland setting. 30min from Lisbon. Monthly ED programming already established!

regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.name: Ecstatic Dance Lisbon
regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.booking_approach: Lisbon has growing ED scene. Contact via Instagram for cooldown opportunities.
regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.notes: Part of Portugal's growing conscious scene.

regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.name: Adamae Retreat Centre
regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.booking_approach: Transformational retreat center. Good for live music/chanting sessions.
regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.notes: 5Rhythms & Plant Medicine retreats. Live music nights.

regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.name: In Resonance Festival
regular_venues_lisbon_portugal.booking_approach: Live music + dance festival in nature. Apply for live performance.

regular_venues_barcelona_spain.name: Ecstatic Dance Barcelona
regular_venues_barcelona_spain.booking_approach: Barcelona has strong ED scene. Contact via Instagram first.

regular_venues_barcelona_spain.name: Spirit Soul Sounds
regular_venues_barcelona_spain.booking_approach: Sound bath meditation venue. Good for RAV Vast sound healing collaboration.
regular_venues_barcelona_spain.notes: Sound bath specialist. Multiple Costa Blanca locations.

regular_venues_barcelona_spain.name: Mallorca Yoga & Hang Music Retreat
regular_venues_barcelona_spain.booking_approach: Yoga + Hang retreat. Propose RAV Vast as alternative/complementary artist.
regular_venues_barcelona_spain.notes: Sep 28 - Oct 4, 2025 example. Gaudan plays Hang LIVE during yoga!

regular_venues_ibiza.name: WooMooN at Cova Santa
regular_venues_ibiza.booking_approach: NEED AGENCY. Contact LunArts Agency or through Cavalli Ibiza network.
regular_venues_ibiza.notes: THE premier conscious party in Ibiza. Cave venue. Need agency connection.

regular_venues_ibiza.name: Sunset Ashram
regular_venues_ibiza.booking_approach: Beach venue with conscious vibe. Call directly or Instagram DM.
regular_venues_ibiza.notes: Bohemian beach bar. Sunset focused. More accessible than big clubs.

regular_venues_ibiza.name: Kumharas
regular_venues_ibiza.booking_approach: Legendary bohemian sunset bar. Known for live music. Contact via website.
regular_venues_ibiza.notes: 30+ years history. Live music focus. Less commercial than Cafe del Mar.

regular_venues_ibiza.name: Babylon Beach
regular_venues_ibiza.booking_approach: Beach club with live music programming. Good for sunset hybrid sets.
regular_venues_ibiza.notes: East coast Ibiza. Less crowded, more intimate.

regular_venues_ibiza.name: Las Dalias
regular_venues_ibiza.booking_approach: Famous hippie market + music venue. Apply for live concert booking.
regular_venues_ibiza.notes: Iconic Ibiza hippie venue. Saturday hippy market. Night concerts.

organizer_networks.name: Ecstatic Dance International
organizer_networks.how_to_use: Browse events/venues, find local organizers, contact directly
organizer_networks.notes: Main global directory. Good for finding local ED communities.

organizer_networks.name: Cavalli Ibiza Agency
organizer_networks.how_to_use: Contact for artist representation in conscious/organic music scene
organizer_networks.notes: Books for WooMooN, Scorpios, etc. Need demo + EPK submission.

organizer_networks.name: LunArts Agency
organizer_networks.notes: Books live musicians for WooMooN parties.

entry_points: 1. Start with COOLDOWN sets (15-30 min) - lowest barrier to entry
2. Propose SOUND JOURNEY before/after main event
3. Build to OPENING sets (15-30 min warmup)

positioning.unique_value: RAV Vast endorsed artist + 4-year sunset meditation residency
positioning.video_to_send: Efthymia (RAV meditation) for cooldown/sound journey proposals
positioning.workshop_option: Offer RAV Vast intro workshop as additional value

contact_approach: Instagram DM first to establish connection
Attend events in person if possible
Offer to do a free/discounted trial set
Build relationships in handpan/conscious music community
Join Berlin/Amsterdam handpan meetups for networking

seasonal_timing.applications: Apply 2-3 months before summer season for festivals
seasonal_timing.regular_venues: Contact year-round, but booking peaks Jan-March for summer

priority_actions.action: Contact Ecstatic Dance Rotterdam - already books handpan for cooldown
priority_actions.why: Perfect fit, they already have the format

priority_actions.action: Contact The Shanti Space (Portugal) - monthly ED + Kirtan
priority_actions.why: Already have email, monthly events, near Lisbon

priority_actions.action: Apply to Black Forest Ecstatic Dance Festival

priority_actions.why: Has handpan workshops (Rob Ginero), 100% sober, near Berlin
Networking for handpan community, leads to festival booking

priority_actions.action: Contact Ecstatic Dance Berlin via Instagram
priority_actions.why: Major hub, weekly events, high volume of opportunities
ED capital of Europe, sophisticated scene

priority_actions.action: Apply to Ecstatic Dance Festival UK
priority_actions.why: Major UK festival, run by Ecstatic Dance London

email_template.subject: Ecstatic Dance Cooldown Artist | RAV Vast Live | Sound Healing
body_structure: Credentials: 4-year sunset meditation residency at Villa Porta, RAV Vast endorsed
What you offer: Cooldown sets, opening music, sound journeys
